findings.title: Self-signed certificate generated as CA with KeyUsageCertSign enabling unauthorized certificate issuance
findings.evidence: generateCertificate() sets IsCA: true and KeyUsageCertSign on server TLS certificate. If key compromised, attacker can sign arbitrary certificates.

findings.title: GatewayConfig OIDC IssuerURL field lacks format validation enabling potential SSRF
findings.evidence: OIDCConfig.IssuerURL is a plain string with only Required validation. Used directly in oauth2-proxy --oidc-issuer-url arg. Cluster admin could set internal URL for SSRF.

findings.title: Operator precedence bug in system:authenticated filter allows bypass in bindRole
findings.evidence: Condition if roleName == admingroup-role && e == system:authenticated || e == '' has operator precedence issue. && binds tighter than ||. CRD CEL validation provides primary defense but controller guard is fragile.

findings.title: Unchecked array index on ClusterVersion.Status.History[0] could crash operator
findings.evidence: getOCPVersion() accesses History[0] without bounds check. Empty History during cluster bootstrap causes panic.

findings.title: Secrets injected as plaintext into manifest files on disk
findings.evidence: configureAlertManager() writes SNITCH_URL, PAGERDUTY_KEY, SMTP credentials to YAML files via ReplaceStringsInFile(). Plaintext on filesystem.

findings.title: Fallback container image uses mutable :latest tag from personal registry
findings.evidence: getKubeAuthProxyImage() returns quay.io/jtanner/kube-auth-proxy:latest as fallback. Mutable tag from personal repo, no runtime guard.

findings.title: GatewayConfig Domain field lacks validation allowing wildcard or internal domain injection
findings.evidence: Domain field has no format validation. Used to construct gateway hostname and cookie domain. Cluster-admin only but no pattern validation.
